attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
1 AS BATCH_ID,
        CDC_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_ID,  
        CDC_XLA_EVENTS.APPLICATION_ID,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_TYPE_CODE, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_DATE, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.ENTITY_ID,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_STATUS_CODE,
	    CDC_XLA_EVENTS.PROCESS_STATUS_CODE,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_1, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_2,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_3, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_4,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_1, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_2,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_3,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_4,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_1, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_2,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_3,
	    CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_4,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_NUMBER,
	    CDC_XLA_EVENTS.ON_HOLD_FLAG,
	    CDC_XLA_EVENTS.CREATION_DATE,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.CREATED_BY, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_ID,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.REQUEST_ID,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_BATCH_ID, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_SOURCE_APPLICATION_ID,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_VALID_FLAG, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.TRANSACTION_DATE,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.BUDGETARY_CONTROL_FLAG, 
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.MERGE_EVENT_SET_ID,
		CDC_XLA_EVENTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
		'CDC'AS GLOBAL_NAME ,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME ,
		'I' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM	
(
 SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_XLA_EVENTS
 WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EVENT_ID , APPLICATION_ID  ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
 )CDC_XLA_EVENTS
 WHERE CDC_XLA_EVENTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
